summary: Completed testing of two bug fixes: 1) SAML Base64 encoding fix - verified clean base64 with no newlines/spaces, proper padding, and decodable. 2) Logo Upload fix - verified /api/uploads/ prefix in URLs and images are accessible. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Bug Fix 1 - SAML test endpoint returns valid base64 (no newlines, no spaces, proper padding)
Bug Fix 1 - SAML test endpoint returns signed SAML response
Bug Fix 1 - SAML complete endpoint returns HTML with valid base64 SAMLResponse
Bug Fix 2 - Logo upload returns URL with /api/uploads/ prefix
Bug Fix 2 - Uploaded logo is accessible via returned URL (HTTP 200)
Bug Fix 2 - Existing SAML app logos with /api/uploads/ URLs are accessible
Regression - GET /api/apps/saml returns list with Kissflow app
Regression - Kissflow config endpoint returns idp_url, security_key, metadata_url
Frontend - Admin sees full sidebar (Dashboard, SAML Apps, Users, Groups, Roles, Audit Logs)
Frontend - User sees limited sidebar (My Apps, Request Access only)
Frontend - SAML Apps page displays app logos correctly
Frontend - App Launcher displays app tile logos correctly

bug_1_saml_base64.description: SAML Base64 encoding now produces clean output
verification: No carriage returns (\r) in base64 output
Successfully decodes to valid SAML XML
SAML response is properly signed with RSA-SHA256
bug_1_saml_base64.fix_location: server.py lines 1225-1237: pretty_print=False and .strip() before base64 encoding, decode to ascii

bug_2_logo_upload.description: Logo upload now returns URLs with /api/uploads/ prefix
verification: Uploaded images are accessible via the returned URL (HTTP 200)
Static mount at /api/uploads serves files correctly
bug_2_logo_upload.fix_location: server.py line 41: static mount at /api/uploads/, line 526: logo_url returns /api/uploads/ prefix

critical_code_review_comments: SAML base64 encoding correctly uses pretty_print=False to avoid newlines in XML
SAML base64 encoding correctly uses .strip() to remove any trailing whitespace
SAML base64 encoding correctly decodes to 'ascii' for clean output
Static files mount at /api/uploads/ correctly serves uploaded images
Logo upload endpoint returns absolute URL with /api/uploads/ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working: 1) SAML base64 encoding is now clean (no newlines, proper padding, decodable) - tested via /api/saml/{app_id}/test and /api/saml/{app_id}/complete endpoints. 2) Logo upload returns /api/uploads/ URLs and images are accessible. Admin sidebar shows full menu, user sidebar shows only My Apps + Request Access.
